1: Praise ye the LORD LORD . Praise the LORD LORD , O my soul.
2: While I live will I praise the LORD LORD : I will sing praises unto my God while I have any being.
3: In whom there is there is no help.
4: In that very day his thoughts perish.
5: Whose hope is is in the LORD LORD his God:
7: The LORD LORD looseth the prisoners:
8: The LORD LORD loveth the righteous:
9: But the way of the wicked he turneth upside down.
